# Curator Receipt

## Decision

The source is kept because it is a preprint with real experimental benchmark results.

## Why

The excerpt describes a formal evaluation of coding agents with and without repository context files across SWE-bench tasks and a newly constructed AGENTbench, reports dataset construction details, gives quantitative results on task success rates and inference cost, and presents a concrete empirical finding rather than commentary or theory.

## Limits
